spec_match.rationale: Probes 24 at-rules across 7 categories with CSS.supports('at-rule(@x)') as defined by CSS Conditional 5. Descriptor-style snippets are now tested separately with detached stylesheet parsing instead of being passed as invalid at-rule() arguments, and intentionally removed legacy rules (@viewport, @document) remain covered.

interactive.rationale: DevTools MCP exercised all/container/upcoming/custom filters, category count labels, the sentinel @media check, totals, a malicious-looking custom snippet, and a descriptor-style @font-face custom snippet. Real CSS.supports() invocations update the matrix, while snippet parsing is reported as separate evidence.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises a live grid of interesting at-rules probed with CSS.supports("at-rule(@x)") in the current browser, filterable by category, with a custom probe input for unusual at-rules and style-query-like snippets. The page now makes the at-keyword probe and full-rule parse check distinction explicit.

edge_cases.rationale: Sentinel @media detects browsers without at-rule() support. Custom probe rendering uses DOM text nodes rather than innerHTML; DevTools MCP verified that an input containing created no image/script nodes and rendered as a rejected snippet. The optional snippet field parses @font-face descriptor examples in a detached stylesheet and rejects network-capable CSS such as @import before parsing.

design_system.rationale: All colors come from shared CSS variables; yes/no cells use --accent-emerald / --accent-rose with --text-black. Static scan found no raw hex colors, inline style attributes, or innerHTML in the concept page.

summary: Re-reviewed in Chrome 148 with chrome-devtools-mcp. The matrix now covers 24 preset at-keyword probes across 7 categories, shows filter counts, includes @function/@if/@else upcoming rows, safely renders custom probes without innerHTML, separates CSS.supports('at-rule(@x)') from optional detached stylesheet snippet parsing, and blocks network-capable snippet syntax. The conformance route reported 7 pass, 0 fail, with clean console and successful network requests.
